risk_factors: Unrealized losses in held-to-maturity Treasury portfolio
Net interest margin compression as deposit beta rises
Concentration in commercial real estate lending
Litigation reserve build for legacy mortgage origination
Regulatory scrutiny on overdraft and NSF fees
company.ai_summary: Bank of America Corp. sits in the Moderate risk band. Revenue trajectory is modest positive, complaint volume is in line with sector medians (45/qtr normalized), and 8-K activity is unremarkable. We see no near-term catalyst that changes the constructive view.
